<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>The Bonsai Cafe — A garden café in Mysuru</title>

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bodoni+Moda:ital,opsz,wght@0,6..96,400;0,6..96,500;0,6..96,700;1,6..96,400;1,6..96,500&family=DM+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

<style>
  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     Tokens
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  :root {
    --bg:        #0a0e0a;
    --bg-2:      #121712;
    --bg-3:      #1a1f18;
    --cream:     #f5ead5;
    --cream-mid: #c9bfa8;
    --muted:     #858478;
    --gold:      #c9a96e;
    --sage:      #7a8a66;
    --wine:      #9c4a37;
    --line:      rgba(245, 234, 213, 0.12);
    --line-soft: rgba(245, 234, 213, 0.06);
    --max:       1440px;
  }

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html {
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    scroll-padding-top: 90px;  /* clear the fixed nav when jumping to anchors */
  }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--cream);
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.55;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }
  body:not(.loaded) { overflow: hidden; height: 100vh; }

  ::selection { background: var(--gold); color: var(--bg); }

  a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
  img { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
  button { font: inherit; cursor: pointer; border: 0; background: none; color: inherit; }

  .serif { font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.015em; }
  .mono  { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted); }
  .italic { font-style: italic; }

  .wrap { max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
  @media (min-width: 900px) { .wrap { padding: 0 56px; } }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     GENTLE PAGE FADE-IN  —  no dramatic preloader
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .page-veil {
    position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 9999;
    background: var(--bg);
    pointer-events: none;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity 1.1s ease;
  }
  body.loaded .page-veil { opacity: 0; }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     Staged reveal — gentle fade-up, no mask slides
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .mask-line { display: block; }

  .word {
    display: inline-block;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: opacity 1.4s ease, transform 1.4s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
    transition-delay: 0s;
  }
  body.intro-done .word {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: none;
    transition-delay: calc(var(--d, 0) * 0.06s);
  }

  .fade-up {
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: opacity 1.3s ease, transform 1.3s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
    transition-delay: 0s;
  }
  body.intro-done .fade-up {
    opacity: 1; transform: none;
    transition-delay: calc(0.3s + var(--d, 0) * 0.06s);
  }

  /* standard scroll reveal (rest of site) */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(22px); transition: opacity 1s ease, transform 1s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); }
  .reveal.on { opacity: 1; transform: none; }

  .reveal-word { display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; vertical-align: bottom; line-height: 0.95; }
  .reveal-word > span {
    display: inline-block;
    transform: translateY(110%);
    transition: transform 1.1s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
  }
  .reveal.on .reveal-word > span { transform: translateY(0); transition-delay: calc(var(--d, 0) * 0.06s); }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     NAV
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 80;
    transition: background .4s ease, border-color .4s ease;
    border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px);
    transition-property: opacity, transform, background, border-color;
    transition-duration: .9s, .9s, .4s, .4s;
  }
  body.intro-done .nav { opacity: 1; transform: none; transition-delay: 0.3s, 0.3s, 0s, 0s; }
  .nav.scrolled {
    background: rgba(10, 14, 10, 0.72);
    backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
    border-bottom-color: var(--line-soft);
  }
  .nav-inner {
    max-width: var(--max); margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 20px 24px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  }
  @media (min-width: 900px) { .nav-inner { padding: 22px 56px; } }

  .brand {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: 22px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    color: var(--cream);
    display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 10px;
  }
  .brand .idx {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  .brand i { font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 400; }

  .nav-links { display: none; gap: 32px; align-items: center; }
  @media (min-width: 960px) { .nav-links { display: flex; } }
  .nav-links a {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--cream-mid);
    position: relative; padding-bottom: 4px;
    transition: color .3s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--cream); }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px;
    background: var(--gold); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: right;
    transition: transform .45s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
  }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left; }

  .reserve-pill {
    display: none;
    padding: 11px 22px;
    border: 1px solid var(--gold);
    color: var(--gold);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: all .4s ease;
  }
  @media (min-width: 960px) { .reserve-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } }
  .reserve-pill:hover { background: var(--gold); color: var(--bg); }

  .burger { display: inline-flex; padding: 6px; color: var(--cream); }
  @media (min-width: 960px) { .burger { display: none; } }

  .drawer { display: none; background: var(--bg-2); padding: 12px 24px 24px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line-soft); }
  .drawer.open { display: block; }
  .drawer a {
    display: block; padding: 14px 0;
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif; font-size: 28px;
    color: var(--cream);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft);
  }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     HERO
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .hero {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 100svh;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(1.15);
    transition: opacity 1.8s ease, transform 3s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
    filter: saturate(0.85) brightness(0.75);
  }
  body.intro-done .hero-bg img {
    opacity: 0.55;
    transform: scale(1.03);
    animation: kenBurns 20s ease-in-out 3s infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes kenBurns {
    0%   { transform: scale(1.03) translate(0, 0); }
    100% { transform: scale(1.12) translate(-2%, -1.5%); }
  }

  .hero-vignette {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 2;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 30%, var(--bg) 95%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10,14,10,0.4) 0%, transparent 30%, transparent 70%, rgba(10,14,10,0.85) 100%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .hero-content {
    position: relative; z-index: 3;
    flex: 1;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    padding-top: 110px; padding-bottom: 40px;
  }

  .hero-top, .hero-bottom {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px;
    padding-top: 14px;
  }

  .hero-center {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
    padding: 48px 0;
  }

  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow .line { height: 1px; width: 44px; background: var(--gold); }
  .hero-eyebrow .mono { color: var(--gold); }

  .hero-headline {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(48px, 9vw, 148px);
    line-height: 0.94;
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    color: var(--cream);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .hero-headline .mask-line {
    line-height: 1.02;
  }
  .hero-headline .word.gold { color: var(--gold); }
  .hero-headline .italic { font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--gold); }

  .hero-sub {
    margin: 40px auto 0;
    max-width: 500px;
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.65;
    color: var(--cream-mid);
  }

  .hero-ctas {
    margin: 40px auto 0;
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 16px;
  }

  .btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    padding: 15px 28px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: all .5s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .btn svg { transition: transform .5s ease; }
  .btn:hover svg { transform: translate(2px, -2px); }

  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--bg);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--cream); }

  .btn-ghost {
    border: 1px solid var(--cream-mid);
    color: var(--cream);
    backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
    background: rgba(245, 234, 213, 0.03);
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--gold); color: var(--gold); }

  .hero-bottom {
    padding-top: 20px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line-soft);
  }

  .scroll-cue {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--cream-mid);
  }
  .scroll-cue .line {
    width: 40px; height: 1px; background: var(--cream-mid);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .scroll-cue .line::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: var(--gold);
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    animation: scrollPulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes scrollPulse {
    0%   { transform: translateX(-100%); }
    50%  { transform: translateX(0); }
    100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
  }

  /* hero decorative corner marks */
  .hero-corner {
    position: absolute; z-index: 3;
    width: 20px; height: 20px;
    border-color: var(--gold);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 1s ease 0.7s;
  }
  body.intro-done .hero-corner { opacity: 0.5; }
  .hero-corner.tl { top: 120px; left: 24px; border-top: 1px solid; border-left: 1px solid; }
  .hero-corner.tr { top: 120px; right: 24px; border-top: 1px solid; border-right: 1px solid; }
  .hero-corner.bl { bottom: 60px; left: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid; border-left: 1px solid; }
  .hero-corner.br { bottom: 60px; right: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid; border-right: 1px solid; }
  @media (min-width: 900px) {
    .hero-corner.tl, .hero-corner.bl { left: 56px; }
    .hero-corner.tr, .hero-corner.br { right: 56px; }
  }

  /* floating gold leaves */
  .leaves { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 2; overflow: hidden; pointer-events: none; }
  .leaf {
    position: absolute; color: var(--gold);
    opacity: 0;
  }
  body.intro-done .leaf { opacity: 0.28; animation: leafFloat var(--dur, 18s) ease-in-out var(--delay, 0s) infinite; }
  @keyframes leafFloat {
    0%,100% { transform: translate3d(0,0,0) rotate(var(--r,0deg)); }
    33%     { transform: translate3d(20px, -28px, 0) rotate(calc(var(--r,0deg) + 15deg)); }
    66%     { transform: translate3d(-14px, -52px, 0) rotate(calc(var(--r,0deg) - 10deg)); }
  }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     SHARED  —  section header
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  section.dark { background: var(--bg); color: var(--cream); }
  section.darker { background: var(--bg-2); color: var(--cream); }
  section.darkest { background: #070a07; color: var(--cream); }

  .section-pad { padding: 88px 0; }
  @media (min-width: 900px) { .section-pad { padding: 140px 0; } }

  .sec-head {
    display: grid; gap: 24px; grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    padding-bottom: 48px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    margin-bottom: 64px;
  }
  @media (min-width: 800px) {
    .sec-head { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 64px; align-items: end; }
  }
  .sec-eyebrow {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .sec-eyebrow .dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--gold); border-radius: 50%; }
  .sec-title {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: clamp(42px, 6.5vw, 92px);
    line-height: 0.96; letter-spacing: -0.028em; font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--cream);
  }
  .sec-title em { font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--gold); }
  .sec-intro { font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--cream-mid); max-width: 460px; }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     ABOUT
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .about-body {
    display: grid; gap: 40px; grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    align-items: start;
  }
  @media (min-width: 900px) {
    .about-body { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; }
  }

  .about-imgs { display: grid; gap: 20px; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .about-img {
    aspect-ratio: 3/4; overflow: hidden; background: var(--bg-3);
    position: relative;
  }
  .about-img.tall { grid-row: span 2; }
  .about-img img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 1.6s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
    filter: saturate(0.9) brightness(0.92);
  }
  .about-img:hover img { transform: scale(1.05); }
  .about-img .tag {
    position: absolute; top: 14px; left: 14px;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--cream); background: rgba(10,14,10,0.7); padding: 4px 8px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  }

  .about-prose { }
  .about-prose p {
    font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.75;
    color: var(--cream-mid);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .about-prose p:first-of-type { color: var(--cream); font-size: 19px; }

  .about-stats {
    margin-top: 56px;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .about-stat { padding: 24px 16px; }
  .about-stat + .about-stat { border-left: 1px solid var(--line); }
  .about-stat .n {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 4.5vw, 56px);
    line-height: 1; font-weight: 400; color: var(--cream);
  }
  .about-stat .n em { font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); }
  .about-stat .l {
    margin-top: 10px; font-size: 11.5px; letter-spacing: 0.18em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     MENU
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .menu-rows { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  .menu-row {
    position: relative;
    padding: 48px 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px;
    cursor: default;
    transition: padding .5s ease;
  }
  @media (min-width: 900px) {
    .menu-row {
      grid-template-columns: 100px 1fr 1.2fr;
      gap: 48px;
      padding: 64px 0;
      align-items: start;
    }
    .menu-row:hover { padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; }
  }
  .menu-row:last-child { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); }

  .menu-row .idx {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: var(--gold);
    padding-top: 8px;
  }

  .menu-row h3 {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 62px);
    line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.025em; font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--cream);
  }
  .menu-row h3 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); }
  .menu-row .desc {
    margin-top: 16px;
    font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--cream-mid);
    max-width: 380px;
  }

  .menu-items { list-style: none; margin-top: 0; }
  @media (max-width: 899px) { .menu-items { margin-top: 20px; } }
  .menu-items li {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline;
    gap: 20px;
    padding: 14px 0;
    border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--line);
    font-size: 15.5px;
    transition: background .4s ease, padding .4s ease;
  }
  .menu-items li:hover {
    background: rgba(201, 169, 110, 0.05);
    padding-left: 10px; padding-right: 10px;
  }
  .menu-items .name { color: var(--cream); font-weight: 500; }
  .menu-items .name .hint { color: var(--muted); font-weight: 400; font-size: 13.5px; }
  .menu-items .price { color: var(--gold); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     EXPERIENCE
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .exp-grid { display: grid; gap: 24px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  @media (min-width: 700px) { .exp-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
  @media (min-width: 1100px) { .exp-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } }

  .exp-card {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    background: var(--bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--line-soft);
    transition: border-color .5s ease, transform .5s ease;
  }
  .exp-card:hover { border-color: var(--gold); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .exp-card .photo {
    aspect-ratio: 4/5; overflow: hidden; background: var(--bg-3);
  }
  .exp-card .photo img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 1.5s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1);
    filter: saturate(0.88) brightness(0.9);
  }
  .exp-card:hover .photo img { transform: scale(1.05); filter: saturate(1) brightness(1); }
  .exp-card .body { padding: 22px 20px; }
  .exp-card .row {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .exp-card .tag {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
  }
  .exp-card .idx {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif; font-style: italic;
    font-size: 18px; color: var(--cream-mid);
  }
  .exp-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: 23px; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
    font-weight: 400; color: var(--cream);
  }
  .exp-card p {
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--cream-mid);
  }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     GALLERY
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .gal-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr);
    grid-auto-rows: 130px;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  @media (min-width: 768px) { .gal-grid { grid-auto-rows: 170px; gap: 16px; } }
  @media (min-width: 1100px) { .gal-grid { grid-auto-rows: 210px; gap: 20px; } }

  .gal-item {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: var(--bg-3);
    grid-column: span 3; grid-row: span 2;
  }
  .gal-item.a { grid-column: span 3; grid-row: span 3; }
  .gal-item.b { grid-column: span 3; grid-row: span 2; }
  .gal-item.c { grid-column: span 2; grid-row: span 2; }
  .gal-item.d { grid-column: span 2; grid-row: span 3; }
  .gal-item.e { grid-column: span 2; grid-row: span 2; }
  .gal-item.f { grid-column: span 3; grid-row: span 2; }
  .gal-item.g { grid-column: span 3; grid-row: span 2; }
  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .gal-item, .gal-item.a, .gal-item.b, .gal-item.c, .gal-item.d, .gal-item.e, .gal-item.f, .gal-item.g {
      grid-column: span 3; grid-row: span 2;
    }
  }
  .gal-item img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 1.5s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), filter .5s ease;
    filter: saturate(0.85) brightness(0.85);
  }
  .gal-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.06); filter: saturate(1) brightness(1); }
  .gal-item::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 60%, rgba(10,14,10,0.6));
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .gal-item .meta {
    position: absolute; left: 14px; bottom: 12px; z-index: 2;
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--cream);
    opacity: 0.82;
  }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     TESTIMONIALS
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .q-grid { display: grid; gap: 32px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  @media (min-width: 900px) { .q-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 40px; } }

  .q {
    position: relative;
    padding: 40px 32px;
    background: var(--bg-2);
    border: 1px solid var(--line-soft);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px;
    transition: border-color .5s ease, transform .5s ease;
  }
  .q:hover { border-color: var(--gold); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .q .qmark {
    position: absolute; top: 18px; right: 22px;
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: 72px; line-height: 1; color: var(--gold); opacity: 0.35;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  .q blockquote {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif; font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 21px; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: -0.015em;
    color: var(--cream);
  }
  .q blockquote em { font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); }
  .q .attr {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline;
    padding-top: 20px; margin-top: auto;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line-soft);
  }
  .q .who { font-weight: 500; color: var(--cream); font-size: 14px; }
  .q .role {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--muted);
  }
  .q .stars { display: flex; gap: 3px; color: var(--gold); }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     VISIT
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .visit-grid { display: grid; gap: 40px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  @media (min-width: 900px) { .visit-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 48px; align-items: start; } }

  .visit-map {
    aspect-ratio: 4/3; overflow: hidden; background: var(--bg-3);
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
  }
  @media (min-width: 900px) { .visit-map { aspect-ratio: auto; min-height: 560px; } }
  .visit-map iframe {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0;
    filter: grayscale(0.5) invert(0.92) contrast(0.9) brightness(0.95) hue-rotate(180deg) saturate(0.3);
  }

  .visit-info { }
  .visit-row {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 100px 1fr auto;
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 26px 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
    align-items: start;
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) { .visit-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 8px; } }
  .visit-row:first-child { border-top: 1px solid var(--gold); }
  .visit-row:last-child { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line); }
  .visit-row .label {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    padding-top: 4px;
  }
  .visit-row .val {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: clamp(22px, 2.5vw, 30px);
    line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.015em; font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--cream);
  }
  .visit-row .val .sub {
    display: block; margin-top: 6px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13.5px; color: var(--cream-mid); font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0;
  }
  .visit-row .end {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 9.5px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--muted); padding-top: 10px;
  }

  .visit-cta {
    margin-top: 36px;
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    padding: 16px 28px;
    background: var(--gold); color: var(--bg);
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: background .4s ease, gap .4s ease;
  }
  .visit-cta:hover { background: var(--cream); gap: 20px; }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     FOOTER
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  footer {
    background: #070a07; color: var(--cream);
    padding: 80px 0 40px;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--line-soft);
  }

  .foot-top {
    display: grid; gap: 48px; grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    padding-bottom: 56px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line-soft);
  }
  @media (min-width: 900px) { .foot-top { grid-template-columns: 1.6fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; } }

  .foot-brand {
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: clamp(34px, 4.5vw, 52px);
    font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--cream);
    line-height: 1;
  }
  .foot-brand em { font-style: italic; color: var(--gold); }
  .foot-about { margin-top: 22px; max-width: 420px; color: var(--cream-mid); font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; }
  .foot-socials { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 28px; }
  .foot-socials a {
    width: 38px; height: 38px;
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    color: var(--cream); transition: all .4s ease;
  }
  .foot-socials a:hover { background: var(--gold); color: var(--bg); border-color: var(--gold); }

  .foot-col h4 {
    font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold);
    margin-bottom: 18px; font-weight: 500;
  }
  .foot-col ul { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .foot-col li, .foot-col a { font-size: 14.5px; color: var(--cream-mid); line-height: 1.5; }
  .foot-col a:hover { color: var(--cream); }

  .foot-watermark {
    margin: 56px 0 24px;
    text-align: center;
    font-family: 'Bodoni Moda', serif;
    font-size: clamp(70px, 18vw, 280px);
    line-height: 0.85; letter-spacing: -0.04em; font-weight: 400;
    color: transparent;
    -webkit-text-stroke: 1px rgba(201,169,110,0.22);
    user-select: none; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .foot-watermark em { font-style: italic; -webkit-text-stroke: 1px rgba(245,234,213,0.18); }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     BRAND MARKS  —  logo in nav + hero
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  .brand-mark {
    width: 34px; height: 34px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    border-radius: 6px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #e8d8bb;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.25);
    transition: border-color .4s ease, transform .4s ease;
  }
  .brand-mark img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; }
  .brand:hover .brand-mark { border-color: var(--gold); transform: rotate(-3deg); }

  .hero-mark {
    width: 92px; height: 92px;
    margin: 0 auto 32px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #e8d8bb;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,169,110,0.3);
    box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -25px rgba(201,169,110,0.25), 0 0 0 6px rgba(245,234,213,0.02);
  }
  .hero-mark img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; }
  @media (min-width: 700px) {
    .hero-mark { width: 108px; height: 108px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
  }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     UI/UX MICRO-INTERACTIONS  —  subtle polish
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

  /* Press feedback on buttons */
  .btn:active, .visit-cta:active, .reserve-pill:active {
    transform: scale(0.97) !important;
    transition-duration: 0.12s !important;
  }

  /* Ripple container */
  .visit-cta, .reserve-pill {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    isolation: isolate;
  }

  .ripple {
    position: absolute;
    width: 12px; height: 12px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(245,234,213,0.55), rgba(201,169,110,0.2) 40%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0);
    animation: rippleOut .85s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1) forwards;
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .btn-primary .ripple { background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(10,14,10,0.45), rgba(10,14,10,0.12) 40%, transparent 70%); }
  .visit-cta .ripple  { background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(10,14,10,0.45), rgba(10,14,10,0.12) 40%, transparent 70%); }

  @keyframes rippleOut {
    0%   { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0);    opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(28);   opacity: 0; }
  }

  /* Tilt setup — cards that accept 3D hover */
  .exp-card, .q {
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
    will-change: transform;
  }

  /* Parallax targets — promote to their own layer */
  [data-parallax] { will-change: transform; }

  /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     CUSTOM CURSOR  —  small gold dot, grows on hover
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
  @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) {
    body, a, button, input, textarea, label, select { cursor: none; }
  }

  .cursor {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0;
    z-index: 10000;
    pointer-events: none;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity .35s ease;
    transform: translate3d(-100px, -100px, 0);
    will-change: transform;
    mix-blend-mode: normal;
  }
  .cursor.visible { opacity: 1; }

  .cursor-dot {
    width: 10px; height: 10px;
    background: var(--gold);
    border-radius: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition:
      width  .45s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),
      height .45s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1),
      background-color .4s ease,
      border-color .4s ease,
      opacity .3s ease;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(201,169,110,0);
    border: 1px solid transparent;
  }

  /* grow when hovering over links, buttons, or interactive blocks */
  .cursor.hover .cursor-dot {
    width: 44px; height: 44px;
    background: rgba(201, 169, 110, 0.12);
    border-color: var(--gold);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(201,169,110,0.06);
  }

  /* click pulse */
  .cursor.click .cursor-dot { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.72); transition-duration: .15s; }

  /* on touch / coarse pointer devices, hide the cursor */
  @media (hover: none) or (pointer: coarse) {
    .cursor { display: none !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Custom cursor -->
<div class="cursor" id="cursor" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="cursor-dot"></div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     GENTLE FADE-IN VEIL
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page-veil" id="pageVeil"></div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     NAV
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<header class="nav" id="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="#top" class="brand">
      <span class="brand-mark"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="The Bonsai Cafe logo"/></span>
      The Bonsai <i>Cafe</i>
    </a>

    <nav class="nav-links">
      <a href="#about">About</a>
      <a href="#menu">Menu</a>
      <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
      <a href="#gallery">Gallery</a>
      <a href="#visit">Visit</a>
    </nav>

    <a href="#visit" class="reserve-pill">
      Reserve
      <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M7 17L17 7M7 7h10v10"/></svg>
    </a>

    <button class="burger" id="burger" aria-label="menu">
      <svg id="burgerIcon" width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4"><path d="M3 6h18M3 12h18M3 18h18"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="drawer" id="drawer">
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#menu">Menu</a>
    <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
    <a href="#gallery">Gallery</a>
    <a href="#visit">Visit</a>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="hero" id="top">
  <div class="hero-bg" data-parallax="0.12">
    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1554118811-1e0d58224f24?w=2000&q=85&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-vignette"></div>

  <div class="leaves" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="leaf" style="left:8%; top:16%; --r:-20deg; --dur:14s; --delay:0s"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2C7 6 4 12 6 18c1 3 3 4 6 4s5-1 6-4c2-6-1-12-6-16z"/></svg></div>
    <div class="leaf" style="left:18%; top:68%; --r:30deg; --dur:18s; --delay:3s"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2C7 6 4 12 6 18c1 3 3 4 6 4s5-1 6-4c2-6-1-12-6-16z"/></svg></div>
    <div class="leaf" style="left:74%; top:22%; --r:10deg; --dur:16s; --delay:6s"><svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2C7 6 4 12 6 18c1 3 3 4 6 4s5-1 6-4c2-6-1-12-6-16z"/></svg></div>
    <div class="leaf" style="left:88%; top:58%; --r:-40deg; --dur:20s; --delay:2s"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2C7 6 4 12 6 18c1 3 3 4 6 4s5-1 6-4c2-6-1-12-6-16z"/></svg></div>
    <div class="leaf" style="left:45%; top:82%; --r:60deg; --dur:22s; --delay:8s"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2C7 6 4 12 6 18c1 3 3 4 6 4s5-1 6-4c2-6-1-12-6-16z"/></svg></div>
    <div class="leaf" style="left:62%; top:10%; --r:-10deg; --dur:17s; --delay:4s"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2C7 6 4 12 6 18c1 3 3 4 6 4s5-1 6-4c2-6-1-12-6-16z"/></svg></div>
  </div>

  <!-- corner marks -->
  <div class="hero-corner tl"></div>
  <div class="hero-corner tr"></div>
  <div class="hero-corner bl"></div>
  <div class="hero-corner br"></div>

  <div class="hero-content wrap">

    <div class="hero-top">
      <span class="mono fade-up" style="--d:0">[ 01 / Index — Welcome ]</span>
      <span class="mono fade-up" style="--d:1">[ Est. MMXIX · Mysuru, IND ]</span>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-center">
      <div class="hero-mark fade-up" style="--d:-2">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="The Bonsai Cafe"/>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-eyebrow">
        <span class="line fade-up" style="--d:0"></span>
        <span class="mono fade-up" style="--d:1">A garden café</span>
        <span class="line fade-up" style="--d:2"></span>
      </div>

      <h1 class="hero-headline">
        <span class="mask-line">
          <span class="word" style="--d:3">A</span>&nbsp;
          <span class="word italic" style="--d:4">quiet</span>&nbsp;
          <span class="word" style="--d:5">garden</span>
        </span>
        <span class="mask-line">
          <span class="word" style="--d:6">café,</span>&nbsp;
          <span class="word" style="--d:7">in</span>&nbsp;
          <span class="word gold" style="--d:8">Mysuru.</span>
        </span>
      </h1>

      <p class="hero-sub fade-up" style="--d:8">
        Slow coffee, seasonal food, and a small forest of forty carefully tended bonsai — held open from half past nine in the morning until eleven at night, every day.
      </p>

      <div class="hero-ctas">
        <a href="#menu" class="btn btn-primary fade-up" style="--d:10">
          View the menu
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M7 17L17 7M7 7h10v10"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="#visit" class="btn btn-ghost fade-up" style="--d:11">
          Reserve a table
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M7 17L17 7M7 7h10v10"/></svg>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-bottom">
      <span class="mono fade-up" style="--d:13">● Open today 9:30 — 23:00</span>
      <div class="scroll-cue fade-up" style="--d:14">
        <span>Scroll</span><span class="line"></span>
      </div>
      <span class="mono fade-up" style="--d:15">12, Vinoba Road</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     ABOUT
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="dark section-pad" id="about">
  <div class="wrap">

    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span><span>(02) — The Story</span></div>
        <h2 class="sec-title">A café that felt more like <em>a garden,</em> since 2019.</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="sec-intro">
        We opened with a simple idea: a room that felt more like a garden, and a coffee worth slowing down for. Seven years on, forty bonsai and a fig tree have settled into the rhythm of the place.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="about-body">

      <div class="about-imgs reveal">
        <div class="about-img tall" data-parallax="0.05">
          <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1481833761820-0509d3217039?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/>
          <span class="tag">01 · Juniper, y5</span>
        </div>
        <div class="about-img" data-parallax="0.09">
          <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1501339847302-ac426a4a7cbb?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/>
          <span class="tag">02 · The room, 4pm</span>
        </div>
        <div class="about-img" data-parallax="0.07">
          <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1445116572660-236099ec97a0?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/>
          <span class="tag">03 · Morning bake</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="about-prose reveal">
        <p>The kitchen leans seasonal — ingredients from farms around Karnataka, roasts from friends in Chikmagalur, and a pastry counter that turns over each morning before the doors open.</p>
        <p>The music stays quiet enough that conversation always wins, and the staff will never ask you to leave. Most of our best regulars have written their first drafts at the corner table.</p>
        <p>Come for an afternoon. Stay as long as you like. We have never been in a hurry.</p>

        <div class="about-stats">
          <div class="about-stat">
            <div class="n"><em>40</em>+</div>
            <div class="l">Bonsai, tended</div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-stat">
            <div class="n"><em>VII</em></div>
            <div class="l">Years open</div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-stat">
            <div class="n"><em>∞</em></div>
            <div class="l">Slow afternoons</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     MENU
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="darker section-pad" id="menu">
  <div class="wrap">

    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span><span>(03) — The Bill of Fare</span></div>
        <h2 class="sec-title">The menu, <em>today.</em></h2>
      </div>
      <p class="sec-intro">
        Small and seasonal — ingredients from farms around Karnataka and the Nilgiris, roasts from Chikmagalur, and pastry baked fresh before the doors open.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="menu-rows">

      <article class="menu-row reveal">
        <div class="idx">N° 01 / 04</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Coffee &amp;<br/><em>Beverages</em></h3>
          <p class="desc">Single-origin espresso, hand-poured filters, matcha, and garden-fresh botanicals — brewed slowly.</p>
        </div>
        <ul class="menu-items">
          <li><span class="name">Japanese Iced Hojicha</span><span class="price">₹ 280</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Single-Origin Pour-Over <span class="hint">· Chikmagalur, lot 04</span></span><span class="price">₹ 260</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Hazelnut Mocha</span><span class="price">₹ 320</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Rose &amp; Cardamom Latte</span><span class="price">₹ 340</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Cold Brew, house reserve</span><span class="price">₹ 300</span></li>
        </ul>
      </article>

      <article class="menu-row reveal">
        <div class="idx">N° 02 / 04</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Italian &amp;<br/><em>Continental</em></h3>
          <p class="desc">Slow-cooked pastas, seasonal risottos, and rustic plates sent out from the open kitchen.</p>
        </div>
        <ul class="menu-items">
          <li><span class="name">Truffle Mushroom Risotto</span><span class="price">₹ 560</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Pesto Tagliatelle <span class="hint">· hand-cut, basil &amp; pine</span></span><span class="price">₹ 480</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Tuscan Herb Focaccia</span><span class="price">₹ 320</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Charred Veg Gnocchi</span><span class="price">₹ 520</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Soup of the Day <span class="hint">· ask the server</span></span><span class="price">₹ 260</span></li>
        </ul>
      </article>

      <article class="menu-row reveal">
        <div class="idx">N° 03 / 04</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Pizza &amp;<br/><em>Small Plates</em></h3>
          <p class="desc">Sourdough pizzas fired in-house, and shareable bites made for long afternoons.</p>
        </div>
        <ul class="menu-items">
          <li><span class="name">Bonsai Margherita</span><span class="price">₹ 480</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Wild Mushroom &amp; Truffle</span><span class="price">₹ 620</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Burrata &amp; Heirloom Tomato</span><span class="price">₹ 540</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Garlic Confit Flatbread</span><span class="price">₹ 360</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Padrón Peppers <span class="hint">· pan-charred, flake salt</span></span><span class="price">₹ 340</span></li>
        </ul>
      </article>

      <article class="menu-row reveal">
        <div class="idx">N° 04 / 04</div>
        <div>
          <h3>Desserts &amp;<br/><em>Sweets</em></h3>
          <p class="desc">Small-batch pastries, slow-churned gelato, and coffee-forward sweets from the morning bake.</p>
        </div>
        <ul class="menu-items">
          <li><span class="name">Matcha Basque Cheesecake</span><span class="price">₹ 360</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Tiramisu Classico</span><span class="price">₹ 340</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Miso Caramel Brownie</span><span class="price">₹ 280</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Honey-Lavender Gelato <span class="hint">· two scoops</span></span><span class="price">₹ 260</span></li>
          <li><span class="name">Affogato, house espresso</span><span class="price">₹ 300</span></li>
        </ul>
      </article>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     EXPERIENCE
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="dark section-pad" id="experience">
  <div class="wrap">

    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span><span>(04) — Inside the room</span></div>
        <h2 class="sec-title">More than a café. <em>A small refuge.</em></h2>
      </div>
      <p class="sec-intro">
        A handful of things we've designed for — the long date, the quiet morning, the working afternoon, and the dog that needs a bowl of water.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="exp-grid">

      <div class="exp-card reveal">
        <div class="photo"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548199973-03cce0bbc87b?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/></div>
        <div class="body">
          <div class="row"><span class="tag">Pet-friendly</span><span class="idx">i.</span></div>
          <h3>Bring the whole family.</h3>
          <p>Water bowls at every entrance, shaded corners for larger dogs, and biscuits for very good boys and girls.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card reveal">
        <div class="photo"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519682337058-a94d519337bc?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/></div>
        <div class="body">
          <div class="row"><span class="tag">Open Garden</span><span class="idx">ii.</span></div>
          <h3>Outdoor seating, canopy.</h3>
          <p>Forty bonsai, a single fig tree, and a cross-breeze that turns an hour into three.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card reveal">
        <div class="photo"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1445116572660-236099ec97a0?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/></div>
        <div class="body">
          <div class="row"><span class="tag">Long Dates</span><span class="idx">iii.</span></div>
          <h3>Warm, unhurried rooms.</h3>
          <p>Low tungsten light, linen napkins, hand-thrown ceramics from a potter in Channapatna.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="exp-card reveal">
        <div class="photo"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1554224155-8d04cb21cd6c?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/></div>
        <div class="body">
          <div class="row"><span class="tag">Work-Friendly</span><span class="idx">iv.</span></div>
          <h3>A calm room to work from.</h3>
          <p>Fast Wi-Fi, generous tables, a power outlet at every seat, and no hurrying anyone, ever.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     GALLERY
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="darker section-pad" id="gallery">
  <div class="wrap">

    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span><span>(05) — Photographs</span></div>
        <h2 class="sec-title">Moments, <em>lately.</em></h2>
      </div>
      <p class="sec-intro">
        An unposed album of the room, the garden, and a few of the trees. More on the wall — <a href="#" style="color: var(--gold); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gold);">@thebonsaicafe</a>.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="gal-grid reveal">
      <a href="#" class="gal-item a" data-parallax="0.06"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1554118811-1e0d58224f24?w=1100&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/><div class="meta">01 · the room</div></a>
      <a href="#" class="gal-item b" data-parallax="0.1"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1509042239860-f550ce710b93?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/><div class="meta">02 · pour-over</div></a>
      <a href="#" class="gal-item c" data-parallax="0.04"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1481833761820-0509d3217039?w=800&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/><div class="meta">03 · juniper</div></a>
      <a href="#" class="gal-item d" data-parallax="0.08"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1445116572660-236099ec97a0?w=900&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/><div class="meta">04 · morning bake</div></a>
      <a href="#" class="gal-item e" data-parallax="0.11"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514432324607-a09d9b4aefdd?w=800&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/><div class="meta">05 · north shelf</div></a>
      <a href="#" class="gal-item f" data-parallax="0.05"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542181961-9590d0c79dab?w=1000&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/><div class="meta">06 · plated</div></a>
      <a href="#" class="gal-item g" data-parallax="0.09"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1501339847302-ac426a4a7cbb?w=1100&q=80&auto=format&fit=crop" alt=""/><div class="meta">07 · tea service</div></a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     TESTIMONIALS
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="dark section-pad">
  <div class="wrap">

    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span><span>(06) — What guests say</span></div>
        <h2 class="sec-title">In their own <em>words.</em></h2>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="q-grid">

      <figure class="q reveal">
        <div class="qmark">“</div>
        <div class="stars">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <blockquote>The closest thing to a forest retreat <em>inside the city.</em> I wrote half my book at the corner table and the coffee never let me down.</blockquote>
        <figcaption class="attr">
          <span class="who">Ananya R.</span>
          <span class="role">Writer · Bengaluru</span>
        </figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="q reveal">
        <div class="qmark">“</div>
        <div class="stars">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <blockquote>We came for lunch and <em>left just after dinner.</em> Quiet music, unreal tiramisu, and a bonsai on the shelf older than I am.</blockquote>
        <figcaption class="attr">
          <span class="who">Karthik &amp; Maya</span>
          <span class="role">Regulars · since 2022</span>
        </figcaption>
      </figure>

      <figure class="q reveal">
        <div class="qmark">“</div>
        <div class="stars">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2l3.09 6.26L22 9.27l-5 4.87 1.18 6.88L12 17.77l-6.18 3.25L7 14.14 2 9.27l6.91-1.01L12 2z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <blockquote>Mysuru finally has a café that feels <em>designed</em> — every corner, every cup. And they love my dog almost as much as I do.</blockquote>
        <figcaption class="attr">
          <span class="who">Ishaan V.</span>
          <span class="role">Photographer · with Biscuit</span>
        </figcaption>
      </figure>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     VISIT
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="darker section-pad" id="visit">
  <div class="wrap">

    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <div>
        <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="dot"></span><span>(07) — Find us</span></div>
        <h2 class="sec-title">Come spend <em>an afternoon.</em></h2>
      </div>
      <p class="sec-intro">
        Walk-ins are always welcome. For weekends and larger parties, a quick reservation keeps everything calm.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="visit-grid">

      <div class="visit-map reveal">
        <iframe
          title="The Bonsai Cafe — Mysuru"
          src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=Mysuru,Karnataka,India&t=&z=13&ie=UTF8&iwloc=&output=embed"
          loading="lazy"></iframe>
      </div>

      <div class="visit-info reveal">
        <div class="visit-row">
          <div class="label">Address</div>

            12, Vinoba Road,<br/>Jayalakshmipuram
            <span class="sub">Mysuru, Karnataka — 570 012</span>
          </div>
          <div class="end">IND</div>
        </div>
        <div class="visit-row">
          <div class="label">Hours</div>
          <div class="val">
            9:30 — 23:00
            <span class="sub">Open every day, year round.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="end">DAILY</div>
        </div>
        <div class="visit-row">
          <div class="label">Telephone</div>
          <div class="val">
            +91 82000 12345
            <span class="sub">For reservations &amp; enquiries.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="end">CALL</div>
        </div>
        <div class="visit-row">
          <div class="label">E-mail</div>
          <div class="val">
            hello@thebonsai.cafe
            <span class="sub">Press, partnerships, long letters.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="end">WRITE</div>
        </div>

        <a href="#" class="visit-cta">
          Reserve a table
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M7 17L17 7M7 7h10v10"/></svg>
        </a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     FOOTER
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<footer>
  <div class="wrap">

    <div class="foot-top">
      <div>
        <div class="foot-brand">The Bonsai <em>Cafe</em></div>
        <p class="foot-about">A small garden café in Mysuru, tended slowly and poured carefully. Always open to strangers, writers, long lunches, and very good dogs.</p>
        <div class="foot-socials">
          <a href="#" aria-label="Instagram"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></svg></a>
          <a href="#" aria-label="Facebook"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4"><path d="M18 2h-3a5 5 0 0 0-5 5v3H7v4h3v8h4v-8h3l1-4h-4V7a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h3z"/></svg></a>
          <a href="#" aria-label="Email"><svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg></a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="foot-col">
        <h4>Pages</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
          <li><a href="#menu">Menu</a></li>
          <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
          <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
          <li><a href="#visit">Visit</a></li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="foot-col">
        <h4>Find us</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>12, Vinoba Road</li>
          <li>Jayalakshmipuram</li>
          <li>Mysuru, 570 012</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="foot-col">
        <h4>Talk</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>+91 82000 12345</li>
          <li>hello@thebonsai.cafe</li>
          <li>Daily · 9:30 — 23:00</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="foot-watermark">Bonsai<em>.</em></div>

    <div class="foot-bottom">
      <div>© <span id="yr"></span> — The Bonsai Cafe · Mysuru</div>
      <div>Tended slowly, poured carefully</div>
    </div>

  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  document.getElementById('yr').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();

  // ── Custom cursor (desktop only)
  (() => {
    const isTouch = window.matchMedia('(hover: none), (pointer: coarse)').matches;
    if (isTouch) return;

    const cursor = document.getElementById('cursor');
    if (!cursor) return;

    let tx = -100, ty = -100;           // target position (actual mouse)
    let cx = -100, cy = -100;           // current dot position
    const ease = 0.22;                  // smoothing factor — lower = more trail

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      tx = e.clientX;
      ty = e.clientY;
      if (!cursor.classList.contains('visible')) cursor.classList.add('visible');
    }, { passive: true });

    document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => cursor.classList.remove('visible'));
    document.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => cursor.classList.add('visible'));

    document.addEventListener('mousedown', () => cursor.classList.add('click'));
    document.addEventListener('mouseup',   () => cursor.classList.remove('click'));

    function tick() {
      cx += (tx - cx) * ease;
      cy += (ty - cy) * ease;
      cursor.style.transform = `translate3d(${cx}px, ${cy}px, 0)`;
      requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    }
    tick();

    // Grow on hover over interactive elements
    const hoverSelector = [
      'a', 'button', 'input', 'textarea', 'select', 'label',
      '.menu-row', '.menu-items li',
      '.q', '.exp-card',
      '.gal-item', '.about-img',
      '.visit-row', '.visit-cta',
      '.burger', '[role="button"]'
    ].join(', ');

    document.querySelectorAll(hoverSelector).forEach(el => {
      el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => cursor.classList.add('hover'));
      el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => cursor.classList.remove('hover'));
    });
  })();

  // ── Gentle page fade-in
  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    document.body.classList.add('loaded');
    setTimeout(() => document.body.classList.add('intro-done'), 200);
    // remove the veil entirely once faded, so it can't block interaction
    setTimeout(() => {
      const v = document.getElementById('pageVeil');
      if (v) v.remove();
    }, 1400);
  });

  // ── Nav bg on scroll
  const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
  const onScroll = () => nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 30);
  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });
  onScroll();

  // ── Mobile drawer
  const burger = document.getElementById('burger');
  const drawer = document.getElementById('drawer');
  const icon = document.getElementById('burgerIcon');
  let open = false;
  burger.addEventListener('click', () => {
    open = !open;
    drawer.classList.toggle('open', open);
    icon.innerHTML = open
      ? '<path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12"/>'
      : '<path d="M3 6h18M3 12h18M3 18h18"/>';
  });
  drawer.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', () => {
    open = false; drawer.classList.remove('open');
    icon.innerHTML = '<path d="M3 6h18M3 12h18M3 18h18"/>';
  }));

  // ── Scroll reveal for sections below hero
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('on'); io.unobserve(e.target); }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => io.observe(el));
  // ── Subtle 3D tilt on cards (desktop only)
  (() => {
    if (window.matchMedia('(hover: none), (pointer: coarse)').matches) return;

    const tiltEls = document.querySelectorAll('.exp-card, .q');
    tiltEls.forEach(el => {
      let frame;

      el.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
        // only tilt after the reveal has finished
        if (el.classList.contains('reveal') && !el.classList.contains('on')) return;
        if (frame) cancelAnimationFrame(frame);
        frame = requestAnimationFrame(() => {
          const r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
          const x = (e.clientX - r.left) / r.width;
          const y = (e.clientY - r.top) / r.height;
          const rx = ((0.5 - y) * 5).toFixed(2);   // max ±2.5deg
          const ry = ((x - 0.5) * 5).toFixed(2);
          el.style.transition = 'transform .25s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), border-color .5s ease';
          el.style.transform = `perspective(1000px) rotateX(${rx}deg) rotateY(${ry}deg) translateY(-4px)`;
        });
      });

      el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
        if (frame) cancelAnimationFrame(frame);
        el.style.transition = 'transform .6s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), border-color .5s ease';
        el.style.transform = '';
      });
    });
  })();

  // ── Ripple on click for buttons
  document.querySelectorAll('.btn, .visit-cta, .reserve-pill').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const r = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
      const ripple = document.createElement('span');
      ripple.className = 'ripple';
      ripple.style.left = (e.clientX - r.left) + 'px';
      ripple.style.top  = (e.clientY - r.top)  + 'px';
      btn.appendChild(ripple);
      setTimeout(() => ripple.remove(), 850);
    });
  });

  // ── Subtle scroll parallax
  (() => {
    const els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-parallax]'));
    if (!els.length) return;

    let ticking = false;
    const update = () => {
      const vh = window.innerHeight;
      els.forEach(el => {
        const speed = parseFloat(el.dataset.parallax) || 0.1;
        const r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (r.bottom < -200 || r.top > vh + 200) return;
        const fromCenter = (r.top + r.height / 2) - vh / 2;
        const offset = (-fromCenter * speed).toFixed(1);
        el.style.transform = `translate3d(0, ${offset}px, 0)`;
      });
      ticking = false;
    };
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      if (!ticking) { requestAnimationFrame(update); ticking = true; }
    }, { passive: true });
    window.addEventListener('resize', update, { passive: true });
    update();
  })();
</script>

</body>
</html># bonsai-cafe
